excerpt: Good morning, Below is the requested additional information (include the year) to the UNCLASS tear line. Let us know if you have any questions, comments or concerns. v/r PAROC Intel Data Analysis Technician 15 AF / DET 1 //UNCLASSIFIED// 31 OCT 24, U.S Aircraft observed a possible UAP. It appeared to be oval/orb shaped, likely moving at a low speed. The U.S Aircraft had eyes on the poss UAP for over 2 hours. //UNCLASSIFIED…
